title: SimplySneak
description: Sneak past mobs by pressing Z.
body:
Born as a side feature of SimplyWalk, I liked it so much that I decided to make a mod dedicated to it.

 

SimplySneak is a simple yet very useful mod that gives you the ability to sneak past mobs:

![https://i.imgur.com/u54NwjL.gif](https://i.imgur.com/u54NwjL.gif)

(With Better third person)

I don't even know why Mojang didn't add something like this yet to be honest. Sneaking in vanilla is kinda lame.

It is set to Z by default but you can change that in the key bindings configs, you can also change in the mod configs json so the vanilla crouching behaves like that, ignoring the z key, theres also a config for you to disable animations if you use the vanilla crouch this will essentialy make the usual vanilla crouch behave like the modded crouch.

You can change the movement speed while sneaking, change if sprinting, jumping sneaking or getting hit deactive the sneaking and you can change the mob detect radius!! just check the config files.

Valenn Of the channel Valenn_Ro has made an amazing video showcasing this mod in a modpack, check it out!

 <iframe width="560" height="315" src="https://www.youtube-nocookie.com/embed/K-n9_0XOnp0" title="YouTube video player" frameborder="0" allow="accelerometer; autoplay; clipboard-write; encrypted-media; gyroscope; picture-in-picture; web-share" allowfullscreen></iframe>
 

 
This mod needs Player Animator 1.0.2.
I highly reccomend you to use this mod with a first person mod like Real Camera, or a third person mod like Better Third Person.

## **And please don't forget to check out my other mods**
